column1: # /Print File Options Setup — printer init/escape string.
# Stored on the active /PF session and prepended verbatim to the .prn
# output stream (and piped ahead of the ASCII bytes when /Print
# Printer sends to CUPS `lp`). We use printable ASCII here so the
# transcript can spell the value out; `\NNN` byte-escape decoding for
# real ESC sequences is a follow-on task.
# Pick the range first so /G has something to write.
# /G writes the file. Setup bytes precede the ASCII page stream.
